prompt: A warm parchment-colored scroll unfurling to reveal glowing text, with a mirror reflection effect. The scroll has the words 'Bare Your Soul' in elegant serif typography. Ethereal light emanates from the text. Subtle digital/AI motifs woven into the parchment texture — circuit-like patterns in gold ink. A small green bramble vine grows along the edge. Warm cream and gold tones, literary and slightly mystical atmosphere.
